%%   _____  _____   _____ 
%%  |  __ \|  __ \ / ____|
%%  | |__) | |__) | |  __ 
%%  |  _  /|  ___/| | |_ |
%%  | | \ \| |    | |__| |
%%  |_|  \_\_|     \_____|

= Index =
== Main Texts ==
    * Os textos do ~/Desktop/Rpg
== Outros e afins ==

    * http://tools.goblinist.com/5enc - gerador de encontros 
    * https://dicecloud.com/character/aPRnbK9xf9aRCeboh/Jeje-de-Zamargo - exemplo de Diceclound
    * https://avrae.io/ - Avrae integrando com discord 
    * https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8M0lmNORNm8&list=PLG0aL-SDkL7GCNin0Cn3YJEKU9n3bDtiH&index=3 - Linkando o Avrae
